Metadata.title: Domo — shared household management
Metadata.description: Organize your household's pantry and shopping list together, with a status per item. Free app by Café Labs, available on the web and Android.

Hero.title: The whole house knows what's in the pantry.
Hero.description: Every item marked <tem>Have it</tem>, <falta>Missing</falta>, or <carrinho>In cart</carrinho> — no duplicating everything in a group chat or a separate spreadsheet.

HowItWorks.title: The way your household actually uses it
HowItWorks.step1Body: Every item in the house marked Have it, Missing, or In cart — one tap in the app is all it takes to keep the pantry current.
HowItWorks.step2Body: The shopping list is born straight from the pantry: anything not marked Have it already shows up ready to buy, no need to add it again somewhere else.
HowItWorks.step3Body: Invite whoever lives with you with a 6-character code and manage members and roles — the pantry becomes the whole house's, not just yours.

Demo.title: Rearrange the shelf
Demo.description: Tap a pantry item to switch its status and watch the shopping list update itself — the same way it works in the real app.
Demo.emptyShoppingList: Nothing missing — the list is empty.
Demo.hint: Tap to try it out — local preview, nothing is saved.
